landing.betaBadge: Free during beta — no credit card required
landing.heroTitle: Validate micro-SaaS ideas with real market data, not gut feelings
landing.heroSubtitle: génio scans search trends, competitor landscapes, and community signals to surface startup ideas worth your time — and shows you how to build them.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to spot a winner
landing.featuresSubtitle: Four pillars that turn raw signals into actionable micro-SaaS ideas you can trust.
landing.featureMarketSignalsDesc: Tap into real-time data from search trends, social chatter, and community forums to identify growing demand before it peaks.
landing.featureCompetitiveAnalysisDesc: See who is already in the space, what they charge, and where they fall short so you can position your product to win.
landing.featureConfidenceScoringDesc: Every idea gets a 0-100 score based on demand strength, competition saturation, and execution feasibility — so you bet on the right horse.
landing.featureBootstrapPromptsDesc: Turn a validated idea into an MVP faster with curated AI prompts that scaffold your landing page, tech stack, and first features.
landing.howItWorksTitle: From hunch to validated idea in three steps
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: No spreadsheets, no manual research, no second-guessing.
landing.step1Desc: Choose from dozens of underserved markets or define your own. génio zeroes in on sectors with rising demand and thin competition.
landing.step2Desc: génio analyses signals across multiple data sources and returns a ranked shortlist of micro-SaaS concepts with revenue estimates.
landing.step3Desc: Pick the top-scoring idea, grab your bootstrap prompt, and start shipping — backed by data, not guesswork.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Early adopters get full access. No tricks, no trials that expire.
landing.pricingDescription: Free while in beta — lock in early access
landing.finalCTASubtitle: Join beta users who validate ideas with data instead of intuition. Free while in beta.
landing.faq1a: génio is an idea-validation engine for micro-SaaS founders. It pulls real-world market signals — search volume, forum discussions, competitor data — and scores business ideas so you know which ones are worth building.
landing.faq2q: How does the confidence score work?
landing.faq2a: The score (0-100) combines three factors: demand strength (are people searching for this?), competition density (how many alternatives exist?), and execution feasibility (can a solo founder ship it?).
landing.faq3q: Is génio really free during beta?
landing.faq3a: Yes. While we are in beta, every account gets full access at $0/month. When paid plans launch, beta users will be grandfathered into a generous free tier.
landing.faq4q: Where does the market data come from?
landing.faq4a: génio aggregates public signals from four sources: search-engine trend APIs, social-platform public feeds, niche-community forums, and app-store metadata.
landing.faq5q: Do I need a technical background to use génio?
landing.faq5a: Not at all. génio is built for founders of every background. The interface walks you through niche selection, idea review, and scoring in plain language.
landing.faq6q: Can I export my validated ideas?
landing.faq6a: Absolutely. Every idea card, score breakdown, and bootstrap prompt can be exported as PDF or copied to your clipboard.
